raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "The 'Working Together for a Safer California' plan is a data-driven, bipartisan Senate policy package addressing fentanyl and retail theft.",
    "The plan offers a rehabilitative and holistic framework to dismantle networks of crime.",
    "The bill package will fight fentanyl abuse by preventing and treating addiction.",
    "SB 10, Melanie’s Law, aims to stop youth fentanyl overdoses in schools.",
    "SB 553 is designed to prevent workplace violence.",
    "The legislative strategy prioritizes prevention, treatment, and support for law enforcement agencies.",
    "The plan is set to reverse trends in retail theft and fentanyl overdoses and deaths."
  ]
}
```
